ogTitle: Para Hills West vs Para Vista: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Para Hills West and Para Vista.
heading: Para Hills West vs Para Vista — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Para Hills West, South Australia and Para Vista, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Para Vista has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Para Hills West (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Para Hills West or Para Vista safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Para Hills West has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Para Vista scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Para Hills West scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Para Vista scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Para Hills West or Para Vista?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Para Vista has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
